channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Warren Buffett on Bill Gates' 'distasteful' friendship with Jeffrey Epstein: 'No one bats a thousand in the business of choosing people'
item.description: The 95-year-old defended his old partner while quietly accelerating his plan to give away his $140 billion fortune.

item.title: CDC nominee refuses to say if she'd defy RFK Jr. on vaccine orders
item.description: Dr. Erica Schwartz would become the CDC's fourth leader in two years, after Monarez was dismissed within a month.

item.title: 'I'm his lawyer' — acting Attorney General briefly forgets he's supposed to represent Americans
item.description: One deceased senator, one skeptical Cornyn, and a single no-vote could end Blanche's confirmation.

item.title: Pete Hegseth proposes annual hormone screening for male troops over 30
item.description: Hegseth mandates yearly testosterone tests for men 30 and older in uniform, but the purpose remains unclear.
